name: Banana Bread (Jamaica)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the mashed banana and vanilla.
4. Sift together the dry ingredients and add to the banana mixture. Mix well.
5. Pour into a greased loaf pan or 9" x 9" x 2-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes.
